chunks.title: Oracle against Moab
chunks.reason: A distinct prophetic judgment unit focusing on Moab's specific transgression and punishment.

chunks.title: Oracle against Judah
chunks.reason: A distinct prophetic judgment unit focusing on Judah's rejection of the law.

chunks.title: Argument against Israel
chunks.reason: A comprehensive indictment detailing Israel's social sins, historical unfaithfulness, and specific abuses of religious offices.

chunks.title: Description of Coming Doom
chunks.reason: A vivid conclusion describing the total collapse of Israel's military strength and social order.
